pinpoint.apnsvoipchannel.ApplicationId.Docs: The unique identifier for the Amazon Pinpoint application that the APNs VoIP channel applies to.

pinpoint.apnsvoipchannel.BundleId.Docs: The bundle identifier that's assigned to your iOS app. This identifier is used for APNs tokens.

pinpoint.apnsvoipchannel.Certificate.Docs: The APNs client certificate that you received from Apple. Specify this value if you want Amazon Pinpoint to communicate with APNs by using an APNs certificate.

pinpoint.apnsvoipchannel.DefaultAuthenti.Docs: The default authentication method that you want Amazon Pinpoint to use when authenticating with APNs. Valid options are `key` or `certificate`.

pinpoint.apnsvoipchannel.Enabled.Docs: Specifies whether to enable the APNs VoIP channel for the Amazon Pinpoint application.

pinpoint.apnsvoipchannel.PrivateKey.Docs: The private key for the APNs client certificate that you want Amazon Pinpoint to use to communicate with APNs.

pinpoint.apnsvoipchannel.TeamId.Docs: The identifier that's assigned to your Apple Developer Account team. This identifier is used for APNs tokens.

pinpoint.apnsvoipchannel.TokenKey.Docs: The authentication key to use for APNs tokens.

pinpoint.apnsvoipchannel.TokenKeyId.Docs: The key identifier that's assigned to your APNs signing key. Specify this value if you want Amazon Pinpoint to communicate with APNs by using APNs tokens.
